name: Mustard Yogurt Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine 1 teaspoon of dry mustard, ½ teaspoon of paprika, 1 teaspoon of salt, and 1 teaspoon of sugar with ¼ cup of plain, low-fat yogurt.
2. Mix the ingredients thoroughly to create a smooth mixture.
3. Add this dressing blend to the remaining ¾ cup of plain, low-fat yogurt.
4. Stir well until combined.
5. Pour into a small jar, cover tightly, and refrigerate for several hours before using.
Values per serving: CHO 2 gm., PRO 1 gm., FAT 0, Calories 16, Sodium 148 mg. with salt.
Food Exchange per serving: Up to 2 tablespoons may be considered "free." (Right, even with the sugar.)
